testcase.name: test_09_fabrics_api_returns_moq

failure.message: AssertionError: Fabric Premium Cotton missing moq_value assert 'moq_value' in {'created_at': '2026-02-14T00:01:09.893583+00:00', 'description': 'High-quality 100% cotton fabric, perfect for shirts and dresses', 'id': '7915f249-ac95-49a7-84d2-d1dab8d3d456', 'image_url': 'https://placehold.co/400x500/e2e8f0/64748b?text=Premium+Cotton', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_moq_feature.py:274: in test_09_fabrics_api_returns_moq assert 'moq_value' in fabric, f"Fabric {fabric.get('name')} missing moq_value" E AssertionError: Fabric Premium Cotton missing moq_value E assert 'moq_value' in {'created_at': '2026-02-14T00:01:09.893583+00:00', 'description': 'High-quality 100% cotton fabric, perfect for shirts and dresses', 'id': '7915f249-ac95-49a7-84d2-d1dab8d3d456', 'image_url': 'https://placehold.co/400x500/e2e8f0/64748b?text=Premium+Cotton', ...}

testcase.name: test_10_souvenirs_api_returns_moq

failure.message: AssertionError: Souvenir Branded Mug missing moq_value assert 'moq_value' in {'branded_price': 2200, 'created_at': '2026-02-14T00:01:09.905145+00:00', 'description': 'Ceramic coffee mug, perfect for corporate gifts', 'id': 'bded311f-0896-4e85-aefb-11b172a8ff78', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_moq_feature.py:290: in test_10_souvenirs_api_returns_moq assert 'moq_value' in souvenir, f"Souvenir {souvenir.get('name')} missing moq_value" E AssertionError: Souvenir Branded Mug missing moq_value E assert 'moq_value' in {'branded_price': 2200, 'created_at': '2026-02-14T00:01:09.905145+00:00', 'description': 'Ceramic coffee mug, perfect for corporate gifts', 'id': 'bded311f-0896-4e85-aefb-11b172a8ff78', ...}
